description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic to a certain Nissim and a certain Shalom Pinḥas. The writer is in some distress and perplexity and repeatedly mentions someone "who is a youth and his wife is a small girl." He also mentions arrangements for the orphans in general, and sums of money in Ashrafīs. Possibly connected to the legal document recto, possibly not. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
